allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Regulatory Alert SaaS v0.7.0 — full MVP with security audit + 20 bug fixes

Complete SEC/CFTC regulatory monitoring micro-SaaS with AI-powered summaries,
notification system, Stripe billing, and comprehensive security hardening.

Key capabilities:
- SEC RSS + CFTC HTML scraping pipeline with deduplication
- Claude Haiku AI summarization with topic classification
- REST API + HTMX/Tailwind dashboard with session + API key auth
- Webhook + email notifications with exponential backoff retry
- Stripe billing integration \(Free/Pro/Enterprise tiers\)
- Password reset with stateless signed tokens \(single-use\)
- Topic subscriptions with per-user filtering

Security hardening \(20 bugs fixed in audit sprint\):
- SSRF prevention on webhook URLs \(blocks private IPs, DNS rebinding\)
- XSS prevention in email notifications \(html.escape on all fields\)
- Stripe webhook atomicity \(500 on handler failure for retry\)
- CSRF protection on all session-auth POST routes
- Auth rate limiting \(login 5/min, register 3/min, forgot-password 3/min\)
- API channel ownership checks \(both API key + session users\)
- bcrypt 72-byte truncation guard \(password max-length 128\)
- Batch dedup to prevent IntegrityError on concurrent inserts
- Single-commit-per-source in scheduler \(prevents notification loss\)
- Input validation \(email format, float parsing, null guards\)

332 tests passing across 15 test files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
